title: Implementation of Closure Order. The Closure Order shall be served
content: 51 upon the offender or the person in charge of the subject establishment. The closure shall 52 be effected by sealing and padlocking the establishment, and posting notices in bold 53 letters of such closure in conspicuous places in the premises of the establishment. The 54 assistance and support of LGUs and law enforcement agencies may be requested for this 55 purpose. 56 57 The MWPB Director or the Regional Director concerned shall also recommend the 58 immediate cancellation/revocation of the business name and/or permit of the closed 59 establishment. 60 61 27
